pi_items.source: Task description: 'Save the flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/supply_demand_lesson.flipchart'. Verified against setup_task.sh (lines 13-14) and export_result.sh (line 12).
Task description requires saving to this path. Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 9 which creates the directory, and export_result.sh line 12.
Task description explicitly requires 'Page 1 (Title: Market Equilibrium)' and 'Page 2 (Title: Increase in Demand)'. Verified in verifier.py line 55 which checks for exactly 2 pages.

Task description Page 1 requirements: 'Label axes: Price (vertical) and Quantity (horizontal). Draw intersecting Supply and Demand curves. Label the intersection Equilibrium.' All 5 labels are explicitly required.
Task description Page 2 requirements: 'Add a text label mentioning Shift or Increase.' Both terms are explicitly mentioned as acceptable alternatives.

Task description Page 1 requires: 1) X/Y graph axes (2 lines), 2) Supply curve (1 line), 3) Demand curve (1 line). Minimum total: 4 lines. Verified in verifier.py line 88 which requires at least 6 lines total for both pages.
Task description Page 2 requires: 1) X/Y graph axes (2 lines), 2) Supply curve (1 line), 3) Two Demand curves showing shift (2 lines). Minimum total: 5 lines.

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic content creation task with no external data sources. The task requires an AI agent to create a 2-page economics flipchart in ActivInspire software. Page 1 must display a Market Equilibrium graph with labeled Price and Quantity axes, Supply and Demand curves, and their intersection labeled Equilibrium (minimum 4 lines). Page 2 must show a shifted Demand curve with Price/Quantity axes, Supply curve, two Demand curves showing the shift direction, and text labels mentioning Shift or Increase (minimum 5 lines). The output file must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/supply_demand_lesson.flipchart. All metadata specifications accurately reflect the explicit requirements stated in the task description.
